title.ko: 전위 장벽을 갖는 무기 발광 반도체 소자
title.en: INORGANIC LIGHT-EMITTING SEMICONDUCTOR DEVICES HAVING POTENTIAL BARRIERS

definition.ko: 1. 이 서브클래스는 가시광선, 적외선 [IR] 또는 자외선 [UV] 광을 방출하는 무기 발광 반도체 소자를 포함한다. 여기에는 발광 다이오드 [LED] 및 초발광 다이오드 [SLD]가 포함된다. 2. 이 서브클래스는 그룹 H01S5/00에 포함되는 반도체 레이저를 포함하지 않는다. 3. 이 서브클래스에서 사용된 주기율 시스템은 섹션 C의 노트 (3)에 있는 주기율표에 표시된 I ~ VIII족 시스템이다.

title.en: Individual inorganic light-emitting semiconductor devices having potential barriers, e.g. light-emitting diodes [LED]
Manufacture or treatment
Constructional details
Bodies
having quantum effect structures or superlattices, e.g. tunnel junctions
within the light-emitting regions, e.g. having quantum confinement structures
having a plurality of light-emitting regions, e.g. multi-junction LEDs or light-emitting devices having photoluminescent regions within the bodies
having reflecting means, e.g. semiconductor Bragg reflectors
having stress relaxation structures, e.g. buffer layers
having carrier transport control structures, e.g. highly-doped semiconductor layers or current-blocking structures
characterised by the crystal structures or orientations, e.g. polycrystalline, amorphous or porous
within the light-emitting regions
characterised by their shape, e.g. curved or truncated substrates
Roughened surfaces, e.g. at the interface between epitaxial layers
of the light-emitting regions, e.g. non-planar junctions
Materials of the light-emitting regions
comprising only Group II-VI materials, e.g. ZnO
comprising only Group III-V materials, e.g. GaP
containing nitrogen, e.g. GaN
comprising only Group IV materials
Electrodes
characterised by their shape
characterised by their material
Transparent materials
Coatings, e.g. passivation layers or antireflective coatings
Reflective coatings, e.g. dielectric Bragg reflectors
Packages
Wavelength conversion means
Encapsulations
characterised by their shape
characterised by their material, e.g. epoxy or silicone resins
Optical field-shaping means, e.g. lenses
Reflecting means
Interconnections, e.g. lead-frames, bond wires or solder balls
Means for heat extraction or cooling

title.ko: 그룹 H10H20/00에 포함된 적어도 하나의 발광 반도체 소자를 포함하는 집적 소자 또는 다중 소자 조립체
title.en: Integrated devices, or assemblies of multiple devices, comprising at least one light-emitting semiconductor element covered by group H10H0020000000
Manufacture or treatment
using pick-and-place processes
using mass transfer of LEDs, e.g. by using liquid suspensions

title.ko: 그룹 H10H20/00에 포함되는 적어도 하나의 발광 반도체 구성요소를 포함하는 집적 소자 (능동 매트릭스 LED 디스플레이 H10H29/30)
title.en: Integrated devices comprising at least one light-emitting semiconductor component covered by group H10H0020000000 (active-matrix LED displays H10H0029300000)
comprising multiple light-emitting semiconductor components

title.ko: 그룹 H10H20/00에 포함된 적어도 하나의 발광 반도체 소자를 포함하는 다중 소자 조립체 (능동 매트릭스 LED 디스플레이 H10H29/30)
title.en: Assemblies of multiple devices comprising at least one light-emitting semiconductor device covered by group H10H0020000000 (active-matrix LED displays H10H0029300000)
comprising multiple light-emitting semiconductor devices
Active-matrix LED displays

definition.ko: 이 그룹은 발명의 중점사항이 LED, LED와 밀접하게 관련된 층 또는 LED와 밀접하게 관련된 구조적 세부, 예. LED 간의 상호 연결 또는 캡슐화, 에 관한 능동 매트릭스 디스플레이를 포함한다.

title.en: characterised by the geometry or arrangement of elements within a subpixel, e.g. arrangement of the transistor within its RGB subpixel
characterised by the geometry or arrangement of subpixels within a pixel, e.g. relative disposition of the RGB subpixels
Pixel-defining structures, e.g. banks between the LEDs
Connection of the pixel electrodes to the driving transistors
Insulating layers formed between the driving transistors and the LEDs
comprising two substrates, each having active devices thereon, e.g. displays comprising LED arrays and driving circuitry on different substrates

title.ko: 상호연결, 예. 배선선 또는 단자 (구동 트랜지스터에 화소 전극의 접속 H10H29/39)
title.en: Interconnections, e.g. wiring lines or terminals (connection of the pixel electrodes to the driving transistors H10H0029390000)
Constructional details
Packages
Wavelength conversion means
Encapsulations
characterised by their shape
characterised by their material, e.g. epoxy or silicone resins
Optical field-shaping means, e.g. lenses
Reflecting means
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
